violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A box of potatoes was stored on the floor by the oven

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Tube of sausage and packages of ground beef patties were stored over ready to eat foods in the reach in cooler.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A package of paper towels was stored on the floor by the oven.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats on top of the pop cooler were not inverted.
